title: restore website title sizes and match play subtitle pattern
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Big text is back
gist.blurb: We've restored our website titles to their former, glorious sizes and sprinkled some fresh emojis on the Play page. Sometimes bigger really is better.
gist.summary: Restored website title and heading sizes to their previous larger dimensions and standardized the Play page subtitle format.
gist.impact: Visitors will notice more prominent, readable headings across the site and a consistent, emoji-friendly subtitle style on the Play page.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee adjusting or painting large, chunky pixel letters. Represents typography and UI improvements.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, adjusting giant, chunky pixel letters that spell 'PLAY'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, adjusting giant, chunky pixel letters that spell 'PLAY'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
